# PocketBase Documentation

PocketBase is an open source backend with an embedded SQLite database, realtime subscriptions, built-in auth management, admin dashboard UI, and a REST-ish API. It can be used as a standalone app or as a Go framework.

## Concepts

- [Introduction & Overview](references/pocketbase-docs/index.md): What PocketBase is and how to get started
- [How to Use](references/pocketbase-docs/how-to-use.md): Basic usage patterns
- [Use as Framework](references/pocketbase-docs/use-as-framework.md): Embedding PocketBase in a Go application
- [Collections](references/pocketbase-docs/collections.md): Collection types (base, auth, view) and configuration
- [Authentication](references/pocketbase-docs/authentication.md): Auth methods, OAuth2, OTP, MFA
- [Files Handling](references/pocketbase-docs/files-handling.md): File upload, storage, and retrieval
- [Working with Relations](references/pocketbase-docs/working-with-relations.md): Relation fields and expand
- [Going to Production](references/pocketbase-docs/going-to-production.md): TLS, reverse proxy, deployment

## Go SDK

- [Go Overview](references/pocketbase-docs/go-overview.md): Go framework entry point and app lifecycle
- [Go Collections](references/pocketbase-docs/go-collections.md): Managing collections programmatically
- [Go Records](references/pocketbase-docs/go-records.md): CRUD operations on records
- [Go Record Proxy](references/pocketbase-docs/go-record-proxy.md): Type-safe record access
- [Go Database](references/pocketbase-docs/go-database.md): Raw DB access, queries, transactions
- [Go Migrations](references/pocketbase-docs/go-migrations.md): Go migration API
- [Go Event Hooks](references/pocketbase-docs/go-event-hooks.md): Hooking into app lifecycle and request events
- [Go Routing](references/pocketbase-docs/go-routing.md): Custom routes and middleware
- [Go Filesystem](references/pocketbase-docs/go-filesystem.md): File storage backends (local, S3)
- [Go Jobs Scheduling](references/pocketbase-docs/go-jobs-scheduling.md): Cron-style scheduled tasks
- [Go Realtime](references/pocketbase-docs/go-realtime.md): Server-sent events and realtime subscriptions
- [Go Rendering Templates](references/pocketbase-docs/go-rendering-templates.md): HTML template rendering
- [Go Sending Emails](references/pocketbase-docs/go-sending-emails.md): Email configuration and sending
- [Go Logging](references/pocketbase-docs/go-logging.md): Structured logging
- [Go Miscellaneous](references/pocketbase-docs/go-miscellaneous.md): Security, tokens, URL helpers
- [Go Console Commands](references/pocketbase-docs/go-console-commands.md): Custom CLI subcommands
- [Go Testing](references/pocketbase-docs/go-testing.md): Testing PocketBase apps

## JS Hooks & Migrations

- [JS Overview](references/pocketbase-docs/js-overview.md): JSVM runtime, globals, and limitations
- [JS Collections](references/pocketbase-docs/js-collections.md): Managing collections in JS
- [JS Records](references/pocketbase-docs/js-records.md): CRUD operations in JS
- [JS Database](references/pocketbase-docs/js-database.md): Raw DB queries in JS
- [JS Migrations](references/pocketbase-docs/js-migrations.md): JS migration API (collection creation, modification, seeding)
- [JS Event Hooks](references/pocketbase-docs/js-event-hooks.md): Hooking into app events in JS
- [JS Routing](references/pocketbase-docs/js-routing.md): Custom routes in JS hooks
- [JS Filesystem](references/pocketbase-docs/js-filesystem.md): File access in JS
- [JS Jobs Scheduling](references/pocketbase-docs/js-jobs-scheduling.md): Scheduled tasks in JS
- [JS Realtime](references/pocketbase-docs/js-realtime.md): Realtime subscriptions in JS
- [JS Rendering Templates](references/pocketbase-docs/js-rendering-templates.md): Template rendering in JS
- [JS Sending Emails](references/pocketbase-docs/js-sending-emails.md): Email sending in JS
- [JS Sending HTTP Requests](references/pocketbase-docs/js-sending-http-requests.md): Outbound HTTP in JS hooks
- [JS Logging](references/pocketbase-docs/js-logging.md): Logging in JS
- [JS Console Commands](references/pocketbase-docs/js-console-commands.md): Custom CLI commands in JS

## REST API Reference

- [API Records](references/pocketbase-docs/api-records.md): CRUD endpoints for records
- [API Collections](references/pocketbase-docs/api-collections.md): Collection management endpoints
- [API Files](references/pocketbase-docs/api-files.md): File upload and retrieval endpoints
- [API Realtime](references/pocketbase-docs/api-realtime.md): SSE subscription endpoint
- [API Settings](references/pocketbase-docs/api-settings.md): App settings endpoints
- [API Logs](references/pocketbase-docs/api-logs.md): Request log endpoints
- [API Crons](references/pocketbase-docs/api-crons.md): Cron job endpoints
- [API Backups](references/pocketbase-docs/api-backups.md): Backup management endpoints
- [API Health](references/pocketbase-docs/api-health.md): Health check endpoint
- [API Rules & Filters](references/pocketbase-docs/api-rules-and-filters.md): Collection rule syntax and filter expressions
